message:

@@ -0,0 +1,79 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "jaeger-4647-deprecation-phase-out-grpc-plugin-storage-sidecar-via-hashicorp-plug",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "jaeger: [deprecation] Phase out grpc-plugin storage (sidecar via hashicorp-plugin)",
+    "description": "[deprecation] Phase out grpc-plugin storage (sidecar via hashicorp-plugin). This issue affects 5+ users.",
+    "type": "upgrade",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify jaeger upgrade symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your jaeger deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger -n observability --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors or warnings in the logs that may indicate the issue."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review jaeger configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant jaeger configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger\nkubectl get configmap -n observability -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=jaeger\n```\nWe support two forms of plugins for external storage (https://github.com/jaegertracing/jaeger/tree/main/plugin/storage/grpc)\n  * a sidecar model using hashicorp/go-plugin library\n  * a remote storage implementing gRPC Remote Storage API\n\nEven though"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for [deprecation] Phase out grpc-plugin storage (sidecar via…",
+        "description": "## Which problem is this PR solving?\n- Part 1 of #4647\n\n## Description of the changes\n- Add deprecation notice to CLI flags\n- Add log statement with deprecation notice\n\n## How was this change tested?\n```\n$ SPAN_STORAGE_TYPE=grpc-plugin go run ./cmd/all-in-one help\n\n     \n```yaml\n$ SPAN_STORAGE_TYPE=grpc-plugin go run ./cmd/all-in-one help\n\n      --grpc-storage-plugin.binary string                         (deprecated, will be removed after 2024-03-01) The location of the plugin binary\n      --grpc-storage-plugin.configuration-file string             (deprecated, will be removed after 2024-03-01) A path pointing to the plugin's configuration file, made available to the plugin with the --config arg\n\n\n$ SPAN_STORAGE_TYPE=grpc-plugin go run ./cmd/all-in-one --grpc-storage-plugin.binary=abcd\n\n2023/09/10 00:39:38 (deprecated, will be removed after 2024-03-01) using sidecar m\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Upgrade jaeger to include the fix",
+        "description": "If the fix is included in a newer release, upgrade jaeger:\n```bash\nhelm repo update\nhelm upgrade jaeger jaeger/jaeger --namespace jaeger\n```\nVerify the upgrade:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n observability\nhelm list -n observability\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm [deprecation] Phase out grpc-plugin storage… is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=jaeger -n observability --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n observability --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "## Which problem is this PR solving?\n- Part 1 of #4647\n\n## Description of the changes\n- Add deprecation notice to CLI flags\n- Add log statement with deprecation notice\n\n## How was this change tested?\n```\n$ SPAN_STORAGE_TYPE=grpc-plugin go run ./cmd/all-in-one help\n\n      --grpc-storage-plugin.binary string                         (deprecated, will be removed after 2024-03-01) The location of the",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "$ SPAN_STORAGE_TYPE=grpc-plugin go run ./cmd/all-in-one help\n\n      --grpc-storage-plugin.binary string                         (deprecated, will be removed after 2024-03-01) The location of the plugin binary\n      --grpc-storage-plugin.configuration-file string             (deprecated, will be removed after 2024-03-01) A path pointing to the plugin's configuration file, made available to the plugin with the --config arg\n\n\n$ SPAN_STORAGE_TYPE=grpc-plugin go run ./cmd/all-in-one --grpc-storage-plugin.binary=abcd\n\n2023/09/10 00:39:38 (deprecated, will be removed after 2024-03-01) using sidecar model of grpc-plugin storage, please upgrade to 'reomte' gRPC storage. https://github.com/jaegertracing/jaeger/issues/4647"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
